scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend "npm run dev --workspace backend" "npm run dev --workspace frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace frontend
scripts.db:migrate:status: npm run build --workspace backend && npm run db:migrate:status --workspace backend
scripts.db:migrate:up: npm run build --workspace backend && npm run db:migrate:up --workspace backend
scripts.db:migrate:down: npm run build --workspace backend && npm run db:migrate:down --workspace backend
scripts.test:e2e:ws: npm run build --workspace backend && npm run test:e2e:ws --workspace backend
